items.title: India's landmark Ram temple overhauls board after alleged theft of donations
items.dek: Questions have been raised over alleged theft of cash, valuable jewellery, gold and silver offered by devotees.
items.body: Questions have been raised over alleged theft of cash, valuable jewellery, gold and silver offered by devotees.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: PM apologises for saying he would 'shag' Kylie Minogue in podcast game
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Zelensky to press Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
items.dek: The Ukrainian president will use the Nato meeting in Turkey to argue he needs more interceptor missiles.
items.body: The Ukrainian president will use the Nato meeting in Turkey to argue he needs more interceptor missiles.
items.author: IriLine Desk
